enterprise.name: Enterprise Engineering
enterprise.description: Full engineering team. No design agents.
enterprise.best_for: Complex apps, internal tools needing no design polish

saas-product.name: SaaS Product
saas-product.description: Engineering + UI/UX designer (14 skills) + conversion optimizer. For products where design quality drives revenue.
saas-product.best_for: SaaS products, B2B/B2C apps, dashboards, subscription products

internal-tool.name: Internal Tool
internal-tool.description: Engineering-focused with practical design. UI/UX designer for usable interfaces without over-polishing.
internal-tool.best_for: Admin panels, internal dashboards, developer tools, back-office apps

game-interactive.name: Game / Interactive
game-interactive.description: UI/UX + mobile designer for rich interactions, touch zones, animations. For highly interactive frontends.
game-interactive.best_for: Games, interactive experiences, creative tools, canvas-heavy apps

marketing-site.name: Marketing Site
marketing-site.description: Conversion-driven design. All 3 designers + frontend only. No backend.
marketing-site.best_for: Landing pages, marketing sites, pricing pages, product launches
